## 4. DRY / SOLID Compliance

### 4.1 Duplication Hotspots

- `core/modules/auto_adaptation.py`: SIM102 Use a single `if` statement instead of nested `if` statements at line 346.
- `core/modules/context.py`: SIM102 Use a single `if` statement instead of nested `if` statements at line 94.
- `core/modules/evolution.py`: SIM102 Use a single `if` statement instead of nested `if` statements at line 53.
- `core/modules/multi_ai.py`: SIM112 Use capitalized environment variable `GOOGLE_API` instead of `google_api` at line 19.
- `core/modules/tool_registry.py`: SIM118 Use `key in dict` instead of `key in dict.keys()` at line 355.
- `core/services/context_manager.py`: SIM102 Use a single `if` statement instead of nested `if` statements at line 42.
- `core/services/tool_engine.py`: SIM108 Use ternary operator `clean_json = json_blocks[0] if json_blocks else tool_call_json.strip()` instead of `if`-`else`-block at line 29.
